personas: Primary User: Tech-savvy professional seeking efficient task management and quick access to data insights.
Secondary User: Casual user interested in simple, intuitive interface for tracking personal goals.
key_flows: User onboarding and account setup including profile customization.
Creating, editing, and completing tasks with real-time progress tracking.
Accessing and interpreting dashboard data visualizations.
Receiving notifications and alerts about task deadlines or updates.
friction_points: Confusing navigation between task creation and dashboard views.
Lack of immediate feedback after task actions leading to uncertainty.
Overloaded interface on mobile devices causing difficulty in finding key features.

information_architecture.hierarchy: Prioritize user tasks and progress overview at the top level, followed by detailed task management and analytics, with settings and support accessible but secondary.
categorization: Tasks categorized by status: Pending, In Progress, Completed
Notifications sorted by type: Alerts, Reminders, Updates
Settings divided into Profile, Preferences, and Integrations

layout_structure.type: Two-column layout for desktop, single column for mobile and tablet
components: Main content area for lists and dashboards
Top header with search and user profile

responsive.mobile: Single column layout with collapsible hamburger menu for navigation, main content stacked vertically, touch-friendly buttons.
responsive.tablet: Single column layout with visible top navigation bar, collapsible sidebar available, larger tap targets.
responsive.desktop: Two-column layout with persistent left sidebar, main content area displayed prominently, header fixed at top.

design_system.typography: Primary font: 'Roboto', sans-serif. Headings use weight 700, body text weight 400. Font sizes range from 12px (small captions) to 24px (main headings). Line height 1.5 for readability.
design_system.colors: Palette includes primary blue (#1E88E5), secondary teal (#00796B), neutral greys (#F5F5F5, #9E9E9E, #212121), and error red (#D32F2F). Use primary colors for calls to action and important highlights.
design_system.spacing: Base spacing unit of 8px. Margins and paddings use multiples of 8px (8, 16, 24, 32, 40). Consistent gutter spacing between components.
components: Buttons: primary, secondary, disabled states with clear visual hierarchy.
Inputs: text fields, dropdowns, toggles with focus and error states.
Cards: for grouping related content with subtle shadows and rounded corners.
Modals: centered with overlay, dismissible via button and ESC key.
Notifications: toast style with auto-dismiss and manual close.

accessibility.keyboard_nav: All interactive elements accessible via keyboard tabbing order. Focus indicators clearly visible. Modal dialogs trap focus until dismissed.
accessibility.screen_reader: ARIA roles and labels applied for all interactive components. Dynamic content updates announced appropriately. Semantic HTML5 elements used throughout.
accessibility.contrast_ratio: Minimum 4.5:1 for text, 3:1 for graphical objects and UI components.

interactions.animations: Subtle fade and slide transitions for modals and notifications. Button interactions include color and shadow shifts with 150ms easing.
interactions.loading_state: Spinner centered within content area with accessible 'loading' text for screen readers. Skeleton screens used for lists and cards to indicate data loading.
interactions.empty_state: Informative message with icon and call to action to create new content or refresh. Empty states visually distinct with ample whitespace.
